DMI data

Overview of DMI stations

For detailed info about the stations and the observation parameters, see DMI’s documentation

Code 
# create connection to database

from pathlib import Path
from helper_functions import read_file
from db_connection import SQLRunner, get_engine

config_file = Path('./db_config.ini')
sql_runner = SQLRunner(get_engine(config_file))

Stations in Denmark, Greenland, and the Faroe Islands, see Figure 1.

Code 
import pandas as pd

# query station data
query = read_file(Path('sql_queries/active_stations.sql'))
df = pd.DataFrame(sql_runner.run_query(query))
Code 
import pandas as pd
import geopandas as gpd
from ipyleaflet import Map, basemaps, GeoData, Popup
from ipywidgets import widgets

# define map of Denmark, Greenland, and the Faroe Islands
m = Map(basemap=basemaps.CartoDB.Positron, center=(68, -16), zoom=3)

# create geopandas dataframe
gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
  df[['latitude', 'longitude', 'stationId', 'name', 'type']], 
  geometry=gpd.points_from_xy(df.longitude, df.latitude)
  )

geo_data = GeoData(geo_dataframe = gdf,
    style={'color':'black', 'radius':5, 'fillColor':'#3366cc', 'opacity':0.5, 'weight':1.9, 'fillOpacity':0.6},
    hover_style={'fillColor':'red' ,'fillOpacity':0.5},
    point_style={'radius':5, 'color':'red', 'fillOpacity':0.8, 'fillColor':'blue', 'weight':3}
    )

m.add(geo_data)

The stations closest to the three SPAC locations in Aarhus, Odense, and Ballerup

Code 
# the stations nearest SPAC Aarhus, Odense, and Ballerup
stations_nearest_spac = pd.concat([
  df.sort_values('distanceAarhus').head(5), 
  df.sort_values('distanceOdense').head(5),
  df.sort_values('distanceBallerup').head(5)])

# define map of Denmark
m = Map(basemap=basemaps.CartoDB.Positron, center=(56, 11.2), zoom=6) # Denmark

# create geopandas dataframe
gdf2 = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
  stations_nearest_spac[['latitude', 'longitude', 'stationId', 'name', 'type']], 
  geometry=gpd.points_from_xy(stations_nearest_spac.longitude, stations_nearest_spac.latitude)
  )

# all stations in Denmark
geo_data1 = GeoData(geo_dataframe = gdf,
    style={'color':'black', 'radius':5, 'fillColor':'#3366cc', 'opacity':0.2, 'weight':1.9, 'fillOpacity':0.2},
    hover_style={'fillColor':'red' ,'fillOpacity':0.5},
    point_style={'radius':5, 'color':'red', 'fillOpacity':0.2, 'fillColor':'blue', 'weight':3}
    )

# only the stations closest to SPAC
geo_data2 = GeoData(geo_dataframe = gdf2,
    style={'color':'black', 'radius':5, 'fillColor':'#A55C48', 'opacity':0.3, 'weight':1.9, 'fillOpacity':0.8},
    hover_style={'fillColor':'red' ,'fillOpacity':0.5},
    point_style={'radius':5, 'color':'red', 'fillOpacity':0.8, 'fillColor':'blue', 'weight':3}
    )

m.add(geo_data1)
m.add(geo_data2)

The five nearest stations to Aarhus:

Code 
df_render = df.copy()

# rename columns for visual
df_render.rename(
  columns={
    'stationId': 'Station ID', 
    'type': 'Type',
    'name': 'Name',
    'operationFrom': 'Operation from',
    'parameters': 'Parameters',
    'distanceAarhus': 'Distance to Aarhus'
    }, inplace=True)

df_render['Operation from'] = df_render['Operation from'].apply(lambda x: x.date())

# pick the five stations nearest Aarhus
df_render[['Station ID', 'Type', 'Name', 'Operation from', 'Parameters', 'Distance to Aarhus']].sort_values('Distance to Aarhus').head(5).set_index('Station ID')
Type Name Operation from Parameters Distance to Aarhus
Station ID
23105 Manual snow Malling 2023-10-01 [snow_cover_man, snow_depth_man] 12.427352
06072 Synop Ødum 2001-05-28 [humidity, humidity_past1h, leav_hum_dur_past1... 17.212622
06039 Synop Galten 2025-10-23 [cloud_cover, cloud_height, humidity, precip_d... 19.157657
06073 Synop Sletterhage Fyr 1977-07-01 [cloud_cover, cloud_height, humidity, humidity... 19.936431
22232 Manual snow Ødum 2012-01-01 [snow_cover_man, snow_depth_man] 20.527863

Aarhus 2025

Dayplots for various parameters

Code 
import dayplot as dp
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd


def query_to_df(sql_file):
  query = read_file(Path(sql_file))
  return pd.DataFrame(sql_runner.run_query(query))


def make_dayplot(df, parameter, color, title, vmax=None):

  # Upsample to 365 days
  df.set_index('date', inplace = True)
  df = df.asfreq('D', fill_value=0)

  # define figure
  fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
  ax.set_title(title, loc='left')
  c = dp.calendar(
      dates=df.index,
      values=df[parameter],
      start_date="2025-01-01",
      end_date="2025-12-31",
      week_starts_on='Monday',
      month_grid=True,
      cmap=color,
      vmin=0,
      vmax=vmax,
      color_for_none='white',
      ax=ax,
  )
  plt.tight_layout()
  plt.show()

# Precipitation
df = query_to_df('sql_queries/accumulated_precip_aarhus_2025.sql')
make_dayplot(df, parameter='accum_precip', color='BuGn', title='Accumulated precipitation')
print('Rainy days:', len(df[df['accum_precip'] > 0]))
print(f'Max accumulated rain in one day: {df['accum_precip'].max():.1f} mm')

# Sunshine
df = query_to_df('sql_queries/sunshine_aarhus_2025.sql')
make_dayplot(df, parameter='sunshine', color='Oranges', title='Sun hours')
print('Sunmy days:', len(df[df['sunshine'] > 0]))
print(f'Max accumulated sun hours in one day: {df['sunshine'].max() / 60:.1f} h')

# Snow depth
df = query_to_df('sql_queries/snow_depth_aarhus_2025.sql')
df.replace(-1, 0.25, inplace=True)  # the code -1 means "less than 0.5 cm" --> I'll set it to 0.25
make_dayplot(df, parameter='snow', color='Blues', title='Snow depth')
print('Snowy days:', len(df[df['snow'] > 0]))
print(f'Max snow depth: {df['snow'].max():.1f} cm')

# Max wind
df = query_to_df('sql_queries/max_wind_speed_aarhus_2025.sql')
make_dayplot(df, parameter='wind_max', color='BuPu', title='Daily averaged wind gusts')
print('Windy days*:', len(df[df['wind_max'] > 0]))
max_gusts = df['wind_max'].max()
print(f'Max average gust speed*: {max_gusts:.1f} m/s')

# Mean wind
df = query_to_df('sql_queries/mean_wind_speed_aarhus_2025.sql')
make_dayplot(df, parameter='wind_speed', color='BuPu', title='Daily averaged mean wind', vmax=max_gusts)
print('Windy days*:', len(df[df['wind_speed'] > 0]))
print(f'Max average wind speed*: {df['wind_speed'].max():.1f} m/s')
Rainy days: 172
Max accumulated rain in one day: 25.7 mm
Sunmy days: 334
Max accumulated sun hours in one day: 15.5 h
Snowy days: 6
Max snow depth: 8.0 cm
Windy days*: 360
Max average gust speed*: 15.2 m/s
Windy days*: 360
Max average wind speed*: 8.4 m/s
